summary: A sedan traveling on a two-lane road collides violently with another vehicle, causing both cars to explode outward.

events_timeline.event: A sedan travels along a two-lane road when it crashes into a truck traveling in the opposite direction.

uncertainties: The identity of the truck traveling in the opposite direction is unclear.
Details about the truck's license plate are missing.

risk_assessment.why: Collision between two vehicles results in violent explosion and destruction.
